http_request_duration_highr_seconds.description: Latency with many buckets but no API specific labels. Made for more accurate percentile calculations.

http_request_duration_seconds.description: Latency with only few buckets by handler. Made to be only used if aggregation by handler is important.

http_requests.description: Total number of requests by method, status and handler.

vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds.description: Histogram of e2e request latency in seconds.

vllm:engine_sleep_state.description: Engine sleep state; awake = 0 means engine is sleeping; awake = 1 means engine is awake; weights_offloaded = 1 means sleep level 1; discard_all = 1 means sleep level 2.

vllm:estimated_flops_per_gpu.description: Estimated number of floating point operations per GPU (for Model Flops Utilization calculations).

vllm:estimated_read_bytes_per_gpu.description: Estimated number of bytes read from memory per GPU (for Model Flops Utilization calculations).

vllm:estimated_write_bytes_per_gpu.description: Estimated number of bytes written to memory per GPU (for Model Flops Utilization calculations).

vllm:external_prefix_cache_hits.description: External prefix cache hits from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:external_prefix_cache_queries.description: External prefix cache queries from KV connector cross-instance cache sharing, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds.description: Histogram of inter-token latency in seconds.

vllm:iteration_tokens_total.description: Histogram of number of tokens per engine_step.

vllm:mm_cache_hits.description: Multi-modal cache hits, in terms of number of cached items.

vllm:mm_cache_queries.description: Multi-modal cache queries, in terms of number of queried items.

vllm:num_preemptions.description: Cumulative number of preemption from the engine.

vllm:num_requests_running.description: Number of requests in model execution batches.

vllm:num_requests_waiting.description: Number of requests waiting to be processed.

vllm:num_requests_waiting_by_reason.description: Number of waiting requests by reason. Reason labels: 'capacity' = waiting for scheduling capacity; 'deferred' = deferred by transient constraints (LoRA budget, KV transfer, blocked status). Sum of all reasons equals vllm:num_requests_waiting.

vllm:prefix_cache_hits.description: Prefix cache hits, in terms of number of cached tokens.

vllm:prefix_cache_queries.description: Prefix cache queries, in terms of number of queried tokens.

vllm:prompt_tokens_by_source.description: Number of prompt tokens by source.

vllm:prompt_tokens_cached.description: Number of cached prompt tokens (local + external).

vllm:request_decode_time_seconds.description: Histogram of time spent in DECODE phase for request.

vllm:request_inference_time_seconds.description: Histogram of time spent in RUNNING phase for request.

vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens.description: Histogram of maximum number of requested generation tokens.

vllm:request_params_max_tokens.description: Histogram of the max_tokens request parameter.

vllm:request_params_n.description: Histogram of the n request parameter.

vllm:request_prefill_kv_computed_tokens.description: Histogram of new KV tokens computed during prefill (excluding cached tokens).

vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds.description: Histogram of time spent in PREFILL phase for request.

vllm:request_queue_time_seconds.description: Histogram of time spent in WAITING phase for request.

vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds.description: Histogram of time to first token in seconds.
